svg.title: Paperwork Labs paperclip mark
svg.desc: Gem-style continuous-wire paperclip in slate ink (#0F172A) with one continuous amber (#F59E0B) span across the inner U-bend curve and the adjacent inner straight wire below it (one geometric moment, roughly 1/6 to 1/4 of total perimeter). Long axis tilts top-left at -32 degrees from vertical; constant 11-unit stroke, round caps and joins, no fills.
